ER-S001.name: Pearl Clover Stud Earrings
ER-S001.desc: Four silver clover petals cradle a single pearl, with delicate engraved lines for a soft vintage feel. Petite and refined for everyday wear.

BC-S012.name: Openwork Floral Zircon Brooch
BC-S012.desc: Gold petals outlined in fine grilles, surrounding a center cluster of round zircons. Light and luminous.

BC-S013.name: Openwork Floral Pearl Brooch
BC-S013.desc: Layered openwork petals embracing a center pearl. Available in gold and silver — vintage garden styling.

BC-S014.name: Snowflake Zircon Brooch
BC-S014.desc: Rectangular zircons form a three-dimensional snowflake with a center round zircon. Refined and lightweight.

BC-S015.name: Gourd Pearl Row Crystal Brooch
BC-S015.desc: A gold curve holds four round pearls and a single round zircon. Horizontal silhouette with soft pearl glow.

BC-S016.name: Tassel Pearl Brooch
BC-S016.desc: Gold tassels embrace a large pearl, with delicate zircons scattered like stardust. Light, vintage motion.

BC-S017.name: Zircon Pearl Clover Brooch
BC-S017.desc: Gold branches set with marquise zircons hold a single pearl at the center. Vintage starlit flora form.

ST-S001.name: Mother-of-Pearl Oval Earring & Necklace Set
ST-S001.desc: Gold loops hold oval mother-of-pearl pendants. Earrings paired with a matching fine chain — coordinated soft-luster set.
